positive: A whimsical watercolor illustration of a sleepy sloth hanging from a glowing bioluminescent vine in a dense rainforest canopy. Style: Studio Ghibli meets botanical etching, soft pastel colors, high detail, volumetric lighting, cinematic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, monochrome, cartoonish
